original_text: You produce custom chainsaws on demand
new_text: At the "Chainsaw type?" decision point, the process branches again based on the type of chainsaw being produced

original_text: Your chainsaws have at least 5 properties such as length of the "guide bar" (Schwertlaenge), chain width, electric or motor chainsaw
new_text: If the chainsaw is electric, the task "Install electric motor" is performed

original_text: After your customer told you the properties, you can start ordering the parts from various online sources (in parallel)
new_text: After the production order is created, the process moves to the Procurement lane, where parts are ordered from three different online sources

original_text: After the parts arrive you have to do a manual inspection of all parts, and then assemble the parts
new_text: Following the installation, the task "Assemble first chainsaw" is carried out, leading to the next step of shipping

original_text: During production, you regularly send updates to your customer
new_text: After the production order is created, the process moves to the Procurement lane, where parts are ordered from three different online sources

original_text: After producing the first saw you send it to your customer
new_text: Once the first chainsaw is assembled, the task "Ship first chainsaw to customer" is completed, and the process waits for the event "First chainsaw shipped

original_text: If he likes it, the rest of his order are produced
new_text: After the production order is created, the process moves to the Procurement lane, where parts are ordered from three different online sources
